# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-033](task-0100): Provider Timeout Handling

## Purpose

Implement provider timeout handling.

## Scope

- Timeout logic
- Cancellation
- Recovery

## Implementation

1. Implement timeout
2. Add cancellation
3. Add recovery

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Timeout works
2. Cancellation works
3. Recovery works
